events.reason: Story doc states coherent intent (human-adjudicated to-be model diffed against as-is graph to surface subtraction candidates) with User Value and 5 ACs matching the diff
Feature core engages current reality by design: integration run against this repo (4956 nodes, 66 violations, exit 0) reproduced by adjudicator; real runtime path evidence exists
12-test contract verifies dependency-allowance rules, baseline budget freezing, fail-loud inputs and dry-run vs strict exit semantics; invariants tested not asserted
Change bounded to new module + CLI subcommand + target-model doc per story reason; new module imports only workspace.js; CLI addition additive

Complete failure surface of this deterministic command tested: missing graph, unparsable graph, invalid model each fail loud; no distributed/stateful failure mode applies to an additive dry-run command
unit-test-run.log 12/12 pass plus integration run recorded pass with content binding; unit+integration is the appropriate done evidence for an additive deterministic subcommand
CLI change purely additive: new subcommand and new artifact output; no existing command, flag or output contract modified

Writes only to dedicated new path .vibepro/architecture/conformance/* regenerated each run (idempotent); reads but never mutates target-model.json and graph.json; no migration, no cache, no existing persistent state touched

Diff is 5 files serving one intent (module, 12-line CLI branch, focused tests, SSOT doc, story doc); coherent single-intent unit; target model adjudication itself is explicitly a future human step outside this PR
Parse failure is a real path (JSON.parse of model and graph) and is handled with descriptive throws plus empty-nodes/modules guards, verified by fail-loud test
Changed files do not touch gate/review/evidence lifecycle code; conformance writes only its own artifact and is explicitly not wired into gates per Non-Goals
Command performs no gate/workflow state transition; dry-run exit 0, strict-only exit 2 verified by test; writes no gate/pending/green state
